description: Mexican criminal organization dedicated to drug trafficking and money laundering. It emerged in 2008 as an armed wing of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and became independent in February 2017 under Fausto Isidro Meza Flores. Based in Guasave, Sinaloa, it is involved in the internal war of the Sinaloa Cartel, allied with La Mayiza against Los Chapitos. The group is still active.
